center.id: loc-阿納維利亞納斯國家公園-b03ae7a3
center.name: 阿納維利亞納斯國家公園
center.summary: 阿納維利亞納斯國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Cherrie's antwren、Black-chinned antbird、Ash-breasted antbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ash-breasted antbird (Myrmoborus lugubris) is an insectivorous bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-chinned antbird (Hypocnemoides melanopogon) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cherrie's antwren (Myrmotherula cherriei) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J
